overview: Concierge medicine practice specializing in functional medicine and bioidentical hormone replacement therapy. Dr. Adamcik uses a 20-panel diagnostic test to identify hormonal and metabolic deficiencies and develops customized treatment protocols.
highlights: 20-panel diagnostic testing for hormone and metabolic deficiencies
Pellet therapy and peptide treatments available
targetAudience: Adults seeking hormone optimization and anti-aging interventions to improve energy and overall quality of life.
